name: coding-guard
description: 通用编码安全守护：UTF-8 BOM 检测与拦截、危险写入命令拦截、硬编码凭据扫描、项目技术栈自动感知

interface.shortDescription: Guard source edits against BOM, unsafe writes, and hardcoded secrets.
interface.longDescription: Coding Guard packages coding standards and lifecycle hooks that keep source files UTF-8 without BOM, block encoding-risky shell writes, scan edits for hardcoded credentials, and surface project stack context.
defaultPrompt: Review this repo for encoding and secret risks.
Help me edit files without introducing BOM.
Check whether this change violates coding guard rules.
